sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9371" key="a)ntaganakte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντᾰγᾰνακτέω</orth>, <sense id="n9371.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be indignant in turn,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Oenom.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:6:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
